results.title: pdftex - How to convert PDF to (La)TeX? - TeX - LaTeX Stack Exchange
results.content:
Suppose we have a file

example.pdf

First process it with the free version of InftyReader.
This will not give the TeX directly (except for the first page) but it will produce a file

example.pdf2txt

Then you can run AbiWord on this file:

abiword --to=tex example.pdf2txt

The result is not great, but not too bad either.

Bjørn Kjos-Hanssen's user avatar

A two step process has worked well for me.

Step 1) Convert PDF to DOCX (MS Word)
You can use pdf2docx or use the acrobat online service (if your doc is public)

Step 2) Convert the DOCX to LaTeX with pandoc.

pandoc -f docx -t latex --standalone -o converted.tex input.docx

Pandoc does not accept pdf as input and docx is a very rich format. So, this combination produces reasonably good results.

Mohsen Banan's user avatar [...] Kasra's user avatar
`mathpix`

Import the file using LibreOffice. It will create a Draw file. You have to copy and edit it by pieces into Writer. Then you can use the plugin `writer2latex` to export the results to LaTeX. The final code is dirty, with plenty of stuff you don't need and some errors.

`writer2latex`

If your docs are large enough, this process might be easier than re-typing everything.

Another alternative, if you are dealing mostly with pure and simple text, is to save the file as a `.txt` from the PDF reader. Then copy/paste the thing into your LaTeX editor.

`.txt`

results.title: How to Convert Word to LaTeX: The Complete Guide (2026)
results.content:
## 5 Common Mistakes That Break Word to LaTeX Conversions

When you convert a Word document to LaTeX — whether using Pandoc, dedicated software, or manual rewriting — these five mistakes cause the most problems:

1. Leaving equations as images. If your Word file has equations pasted as images (common in older documents or PDFs), no converter can extract them as LaTeX math. They’ll appear as \includegraphics{eq\_image.png} in your .tex file. Every equation needs to be retyped in proper LaTeX math mode.

2. Ignoring the bibliography. Word’s built-in citation manager stores references in a proprietary format that most converters can’t read. Always export to .bib format separately from your reference manager before converting. [...] Saurabh Shah

Founder, TheLatexLab

Saurabh runs TheLatexLab, a professional Word to LaTeX and PDF to LaTeX conversion service for researchers and PhD students. He and his team have converted 500+ research papers, theses, and conference submissions to clean, submission-ready LaTeX for IEEE, Elsevier, Springer, ACM, and 200+ other journal templates. Every file is compilation-tested in Overleaf before delivery.

View all posts by Saurabh Shah →

academic writing convert word to latex docx to latex equations journal submission latex formatting overleaf pandoc word to latex word to latex conversion word to overleaf

### Leave a Comment Cancel reply

## Don't Waste Another Hour Fighting LaTeX [...] ### During Conversion

 Verify every equation compiles correctly and matches the original
 Check that all tables have correct alignment, borders, and no missing cells
 Confirm every \cite{} command has a matching entry in the .bib file
 Ensure figures are referenced with \label{} and \ref{} — not hardcoded numbers
 Verify the \documentclass and all required packages match your journal’s template

### After Conversion

 Compile in Overleaf or your local LaTeX distribution (pdfLaTeX or XeLaTeX)
 Check the output PDF page by page against your original Word document
 Verify the reference list is complete and correctly formatted for your citation style
 Run a final compile — the log should show zero errors and minimal warning

## 5 Common Mistakes That Break Word to LaTeX Conversions

LibreOffice will export directly to PDF too and read PDF into ODT which is useful when one wants to reverse-engineer a PDF into LaTeX.

ajeh's user avatar

If you're running an AppleScript-compatible operating system, I've written a script to do this. It has many limitations as far as pictures go (totally unsupported), but it handles the essentials (bold, italics, underscores, percent signs, dollar signs, tables (in tabu)). Note that it keeps everything in unicode, therefore the `fontspec` package is recommended with `xelatex`. It is a work in progress. [...] Instructions for use:
Have Microsoft Word document open. The frontmost document will be processed. The script creates a replica before processing, in order to avoid losing data. This document remains open when the script is finished and its contents can be copied to a tex editor e.g. TeXShop and compiled.
Version Notes:
26.12.2013 version 2.0 improved the table support. Now tables are coded as centered tabu tables.
29.12.2013 version 2.1 added list support using standard bullet or simple numbering buttons on the Word GUI. Supports only 1 embedded list.
Issues:
This script depends on a paragraph before a table. Therefore, a table must not be located at paragraph 1. There is a glitch in MS Word, preventing a script from adding a paragraph before a table (as far as I know).
)

results.title: Latex conversion to pdf issues - Bugs - OpenAI Developer Community
results.content:
:man_shrugging:

It says that pdflatex is not found in the environment

Please provide more details as I can only guess what that means.

pdflatex

While the word LaTeX is used colloquially which results in many thinking there is only one LaTeX, in reality there are many variations with even the official download from Tex Live including several that are not compatible.

I tested the prompt without noting `PdfLaTeX` and it still works as expected in that LaTeX is created that has to be converted into a PDF.

`PdfLaTeX`

Create a worksheet based upon algebra 2 remainder theorem problems. Generate the output as LaTeX.

Essentially what you need for this to work is for ChatGPT on any LLM to generate LaTeX specifically and not a variation such as KaTeX. [...] \item Given \( P(x) = 5x^2 - 3x + 9 \) and \( x - 4 \), find the remainder.
\item Given \( P(x) = x^4 - 6x^3 + 11x^2 - 6x + 8 \) and \( x - 1 \), find the remainder.
\item Given \( P(x) = 7x^3 - 4x^2 + 2x - 8 \) and \( x + 2 \), find the remainder.
\item Given \( P(x) = x^5 - x^4 + 2x^3 - 2x^2 + x - 1 \) and \( x - 0 \), find the remainder.
\item Given \( P(x) = 3x^4 - 2x^3 + x^2 - 5x + 3 \) and \( x - (-3) \), find the remainder.
\item Given \( P(x) = 2x^3 + 5x^2 - 4x + 6 \) and \( x - 5 \), find the remainder.
\item Given \( P(x) = x^4 + 2x^3 - x^2 - 2x + 3 \) and \( x + 1 \), find the remainder.
\end{enumerate}
\end{document}` [...] "3. Find the remainder when P(x) = 3x^3 + 5x^2 - 2x + 7 is divided by x - 3.",
"4. Find the remainder when P(x) = 4x^5 - 2x^4 + 3x^3 - x^2 + 2x - 8 is divided by x + 2.",
"5. Find the remainder when P(x) = x^2 - 5x + 6 is divided by x - 1.",
"6. Find the remainder when P(x) = 2x^4 + x^3 - 3x^2 + x - 1 is divided by x + 3.",
"7. Find the remainder when P(x) = -x^3 + 2x^2 - 3x + 4 is divided by x - 4.",
"8. Find the remainder when P(x) = x^5 - 2x^4 + 4x^2 - x + 6 is divided by x + 5.",
"9. Find the remainder when P(x) = 5x^3 + 3x^2 - x + 2 is divided by x - 6.",
"10. Find the remainder when P(x) = 7x^4 - x^3 + 2x - 9 is divided by x - 7."
]
pdf.ln(10)
for problem in problems:
pdf.multi_cell(0, 10, txt=problem)
# Output the PDF

results.title: Word To LaTeX
results.content:
ABOUT THE AGENT

# Word to LaTeX Using SciSpace AI Agent

The Word to LaTeX workflow using SciSpace AI Agent enables researchers and academics to convert Microsoft Word documents into fully structured LaTeX files efficiently and accurately. Manual conversions often introduce formatting errors, lose special characters or diacritics, and create inconsistencies in references or equations. The SciSpace AI Agent automates this process by validating inputs, applying formatting rules, and generating outputs that are compliant, auditable, and ready for scholarly use.

## Common Challenges Researchers Encounter in Word to LaTeX Conversion

Policy and Formatting Errors

 Different journals or institutions require specific LaTeX formatting, which is often lost during manual conversions. [...] Loss of Capitalization and Diacritics

 Special characters, accented letters, or symbols may be incorrectly converted, affecting readability and accuracy.

Hidden Edge Cases

 Complex tables, nested lists, equations, or references may not convert correctly without automated handling.

Inconsistent Change Tracking

 Without logging, updates or corrections in documents are hard to trace or revert.

## How SciSpace AI Agent Supports Word to LaTeX Conversion

The SciSpace AI Agent streamlines the conversion process through automated, auditable workflows. Key capabilities include:
